channel.title: voronoi on StataViz by Asjad Naqvi
channel.description: Recent content in voronoi on StataViz by Asjad Naqvi

item.title: Dali as Voronoi tessellations
item.description: Created using the delaunay package ssc install delaunay, replace For more info visit the stata-delaunay GitHub page.

item.title: Mona Lisa as Voronoi tessellations
item.description: Created using the delaunay package ssc install delaunay, replace For more info visit the stata-delaunay GitHub page.
